cline.customInstructions: You are an autonomous coding agent inside Claude Architect OS. You have access to the full CMNDCENTER stack. When building new features: (1) check agents/registry.json for existing capabilities before creating new ones, (2) always write to src/utils/ for shared utilities, (3) always use claude-sonnet-4-6 as default model, (4) include prompt caching on system prompts, (5) after completing a task, run: bash ~/CMNDCENTER/repos/claude-architect-os/scripts/upgrade.sh --quick to sync memory.
